title: Bountiful Small Ships
description: Compatibility patch.  Trade in raw wood and wool for sails, leads, and whole boats with Shipwright bounties.
body:
Compatibility patch between Bountiful and Small Ships.

Adds leads to the reward pool for all decrees at a moderate weight.

Also adds a Shipwright decree.
Objectives:  Any tagged Log, Plank, or Wool.
Rewards: Sails, leads, boats, boats with chests, cogs, briggs, and galleys, in all woodtypes.
